violations.description: General employee practices. — --- Employee items found mixed in with restaurant food items in cooler.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --- Broccoli being prepped sitting on floor.
Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food wontons, and chili sauce on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. - Shrimp sitting in water thawing.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items throughout all coolers not date marked -

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration -Found dishwasher at 0ppm CL at time of inspection.
Linen storage. — --Clean linen was not stored in a clean, dry location or protected from contamination. - Towels found on floor in storage area

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Found wet cloths in server area. Needs to be kept in sanitizer bucket when in use.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items throughout all coolers not date marked
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
